---
title: "Get Crypto Invoice by ID"
sidebarTitle: "/invoices/payment-gateway/{id}"
api: "GET https://api.gates2b.com/invoices/payment-gateway/{id}"
authMethod: "authorization"
description: "This endpoint returns full details for a crypto invoice (gateway payment) by its ID."
---

<ParamField
  header="Authorization"
  type="string"
  placeholder="Bearer {token}"
  required
>
  The Bearer authentication token is required to access this endpoint.
</ParamField>

<ParamField
  path="id"
  type="string"
  placeholder="68d2fa97b30181b2d2f13600"
  required
>
  The unique ID of the crypto invoice you want to retrieve.
</ParamField>

### Response

<ResponseField name="status" type="number">
  HTTP response code. Expected: 200 (OK).
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="code" type="string">
  Response status code.
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="response" type="object">
Response content with invoice details.

<Expandable title="Mostrar objeto">

<ResponseField name="id" type="string">
  Unique invoice identifier.
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="type" type="string">
  Invoice type (PAYMENT or WITHDRAWAL).
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="status" type="string">
  Current invoice status.
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="amount" type="number">
  Transaction amount.
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="currency" type="string">
  Transaction currency.
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="gateway" type="string">
  Gateway name used (e.g., NOWPAYMENTS).
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="user_id" type="number">
  Owner user ID of the invoice.
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="external_reference" type="string">
  External reference for your application.
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="createdAt" type="string">
  Invoice creation date (ISO format).
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="updatedAt" type="string">
  Invoice last update date (ISO format).
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="payment_details" type="object">
  Payment-specific details.
<Expandable title="Mostrar objeto">
<ResponseField name="pay_address" type="string">
  Address to send funds to (destination wallet).
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="qr_code" type="string">
  Base64 QR code to facilitate payment.
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="expires_at" type="string">
  Payment expiration date and time (ISO format).
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="pay_currency" type="string">
  Crypto currency used for payment (e.g., USDTBSC, BTC, ETH).
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="fiat_currency" type="string">
  Fiat reference currency (e.g., BRL, USD).
</ResponseField>
</Expandable>
</ResponseField>

</Expandable>
</ResponseField>

<ResponseExample>
```json
{
  "status": 200,
  "code": "success",
  "response": {
    "id": "68d2fa97b30181b2d2f13600",
    "type": "PAYMENT",
    "status": "WAITING_PAYMENT",
    "amount": 71.4226873,
    "currency": "BRL",
    "gateway": "NOWPAYMENTS",
    "user_id": 123,
    "external_reference": "INV-2024-001",
    "createdAt": "2024-09-24T19:52:55.998Z",
    "updatedAt": "2024-09-24T19:52:55.998Z",
    "payment_details": {
      "pay_address": "0x1CEfB8730786f34af8B10dC4e5B8028F79a63abd",
      "qr_code": "",
      "expires_at": "2024-09-24T20:52:55.998Z",
      "pay_currency": "USDTBSC",
      "fiat_currency": "BRL"
    }
  }
}
```
</ResponseExample>
